headline: Morgan Stanley drops timely Honeywell stock opinion

headline: Morgan Stanley says stock market rally faces $1.2 trillion question
summary: Investors came into July expecting a familiar stock market setup leaning on resilient earnings and AI spending, along with a seasonal stretch favoring equities. Though Morgan Stanley doesn’t feel that setup has gone away, it warns of a much narrower margin for error. There's a major $1.2 trillion ...

headline: Why More Retirees Are Replacing 40% Bond Allocations With Dividend Stocks
summary: The 60/40 portfolio held up for decades, but retirees facing 25 or 30 years of rising food, housing, and healthcare costs are discovering a critical flaw baked into the bond-heavy half of that equation.
